data.title: Add error retry mechanism
data.description:
**Labels:** `enhancement`, `frontend`, `backend`

**Description:**
Add automatic retry logic for failed requests with exponential backoff.

**Proposed Solution:**
Implement smart retry mechanism for network failures and rate limits.

**Features:**

* Automatic retry on network failure (3 attempts)
* Exponential backoff (2s, 4s, 8s)
* Manual retry button on error
* Show retry countdown
* Detect rate limit vs network error

**Acceptance Criteria:**

- [ ] Auto-retry on transient failures
- [ ] Exponential backoff implemented
- [ ] Manual retry option
- [ ] Clear error messages
- [ ] Don't retry on 4xx errors (except 429)
- [ ] Retry status shown to user

**Technical Considerations:**

* Add retry wrapper function
* Detect error types (network vs API)
* Show retry progress in UI
* Cancel pending retries on user action
* Log retry attempts for debugging

**Effort & Value Ranking:**

* ⏱️ Time: **Low-Medium** (retry logic, UI feedback, error detection)
* 🧩 Complexity: **Medium** (proper error classification, backoff algorithm, state management)
* 💎 Value: **Medium-High** (significantly improves reliability and user experience)
